error_signature: binary data not forwarded from AI Agent to HTTP Request
context_key: AI Agent to HTTP Request node
title: Binary data not passed to HTTP Request from AI Agent
symptom: When using an AI Agent node followed by an HTTP Request node, the binary data from previous steps is not accessible, leading to confusion about the expected behavior.
not_this_if: Binary data is not needed for the HTTP Request
Using HTTP Request node independently without AI Agent
root_cause: The AI Agent node is designed to operate with JSON-only payloads and does not carry forward binary data from upstream nodes. This design choice creates a limitation where binary files cannot be passed to tools invoked by the AI Agent.
fix_steps: Keep the binary data on a parallel branch before the AI Agent node.
Use a Merge node after the AI Agent to combine the output with the original binary data.
agent_instruction: Use a parallel branch to maintain binary data and merge it after the AI Agent node.
